items.raw_excerpt: The Pinnacle Village aged care precinct will be located in Kingston…
items.summary_en: Christian Homes Tasmania has broken ground on Pinnacle Village, a $120 million aged care precinct in Kingston. The new facility will provide aged care services to the local community.
items.summary_ko: 크리스천홈즈 태즈메이니아가 킹스턴에 1억2000만 달러 규모의 핀클빌 노인요양 단지를 착공했다. 새 시설은 지역사회에 노인 요양 서비스를 제공할 예정이다.
items.title_en: Christian Homes starts building Pinnacle Village aged care in Kingston
items.title_original: Pinnacle Village: Christian Homes breaks ground on $120 million Kingston aged care precinct - Pulse Tasmania

items.raw_excerpt: Na madrugada desta terça (14), em Hanghzou (China), a seleção feminina (foto), atual campeã, encara a Hungria, enquanto a masculina, que busca o título inédito, mede forças com o Japão. Ambas tiveram campanha perfeita na fase de grupos.
items.summary_en: Brazil's undefeated women's and men's sitting volleyball teams are competing in the round of 16 at the World Championship in Hangzhou, China. The women's team, defending champions, face Hungary, while the men seek their first title against Japan. Both teams had perfect records in the group stage.
items.summary_ko: 브라질의 무패 기록을 유지 중인 여자·남자 좌식 배구 대표팀이 중국 항저우에서 열리는 세계 선수권 16강전에 출전합니다. 여자 대표팀은 디펜딩 챔피언으로서 헝가리와 맞서고, 남자 대표팀은 첫 우승을 목표로 일본과 경기합니다. 두 팀 모두 조별 리그전에서 완승을 거뒀습니다.
items.title_en: Undefeated Brazil Teams Play in Sitting Volleyball World Championship Round of 16
items.title_ko: 무패 브라질 좌식 배구 대표팀, 세계 선수권 16강전 진출
items.title_original: Invictas, seleções do Brasil jogam oitavas do Mundial de vôlei sentado

items.raw_excerpt: Three more councillors at Hepburn Shire Council have been served with criminal charges by a private citizen, leaving only two councillors in office.
items.summary_en: A businessman in Hepburn Shire, Victoria has filed criminal charges against council members. Three more councillors were served with charges, leaving only two in office. The small rural council is now at risk of collapsing.
items.summary_ko: 호주 빅토리아주 헵번 시에서 사업자가 시의원들에게 형사고발을 제기했다. 세 명의 추가 시의원이 고발장을 받으면서 재적 의원이 2명만 남게 됐다. 해당 지방의회가 해체 위기에 처했다.
items.title_en: Businessman shuts down local council by charging councillors
items.title_ko: 사업자, 시의원들에게 형사고발로 지방의회 마감 위기
items.title_original: Businessman shuts down council by laying charges against councillors

items.raw_excerpt: Waldemar Segundo compartilhou tendências do festival e destacou a força das boas ideias nos negócios
items.summary_en: Waldemar Segundo shared trends from the Cannes Lions festival in Curitiba. He highlighted the power of good ideas in business.
items.summary_ko: 발데마르 세구ンド는 쿠리치바에서 칸 라이온스 페스티벌의 주요 트렌드를 공유했습니다. 그는 비즈니스에서 좋은 아이디어가 가지는 힘을 강조했습니다.
items.title_en: Advertising professional presents Cannes Lions insights in Curitiba
items.title_ko: 쿠리치바에서 칸 라이온스 인사이트 발표하는 광고인
items.title_original: Publicitário apresenta insights do Cannes Lions em Curitiba - Band News FM Curitiba

items.raw_excerpt: If you've watched the IT films, chances are you've already wandered the streets of Ontario's picturesque Port Hope without even realizing it. The Ont…
items.summary_en: If you have watched the IT movies, you might have walked the streets of Port Hope. This pretty Ontario town is a popular place for Hollywood movies. It is a small and curious town in Canada.
items.summary_ko: IT 영화를 보셨다면, 아마 포트 호프의 거리를 거닐었을지도 모릅니다. 이 아름다운 온타리오 마을은 할리우드 영화 촬영지로 유명합니다. 캐나다에 위치한 작고 매력적인 마을입니다.
items.title_en: Hollywood is obsessed with this Ontario town and I went to find out why
items.title_ko: 할리우드가 열광하는 온타리오의 매력적인 마을, 포트 호프를 찾아서
items.title_original: Hollywood is obsessed with this Ontario town and I went to find out why - blogTO

items.raw_excerpt: CPSU members at two Victorian prisons are striking today, asking for pay increases and parental leave.
items.summary_en: Guards at two Victorian prisons are striking today. They are demanding pay increases and improved parental leave.
items.summary_ko: 빅토리아주의 두 교도소 교도관들이 오늘 파업을 벌이고 있습니다. 그들은 임금 인상과 부모 휴가 보장을 요구하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Ravenhall and Fulham prison guards walk off job in fight for better pay
items.title_ko: 레이번홀·펄럼 교도소 교도관들, 임금 인상 요구하며 파업
items.title_original: Ravenhall and Fulham prison guards walk off job in fight for better pay

items.raw_excerpt: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari announces ₹5 lakh support for 60 Rath Yatra committees and Seva camps for Kanwar yatris.
items.summary_en: The West Bengal state government announced ₹5 lakh support for 60 Rath Yatra committees. The aid also supports Seva camps for Kanwar pilgrims traveling through the state. CM Suvendu Adhikari made the announcement to help organize religious festivals.
items.summary_ko: 웨스트벵갈 주 정부가 라트 야트라 위원회 60곳에 각 5 lakh 루피를 지원한다고 발표했습니다. 이번 지원은 카나르크 순례자들을 위한 세바 캠프도 포함합니다. 스벤두 아디카리 수상이 종교 축제 지원을 위해 발표했습니다.
items.title_en: West Bengal Government Gives ₹5 Lakh to 60 Rath Yatra Committees
items.title_ko: 웨스트벵갈 정부, 라트 야트라 위원회 60곳에 5 lakh 루피 지원
items.title_original: West Bengal govt will give ₹5 lakh to 60 Rath Yatra committees: CM Suvendu Adhikari

items.raw_excerpt: Jewish Australian professor Steven Prawer says he paid a private investigator to try to find out whether people who occupied his University of Melbourne office were students on his campus.
items.summary_en: A Jewish Australian professor at the University of Melbourne hired a private investigator. He wanted to find out if people who occupied his office were students at his campus. This happened after a protest at the university.
items.summary_ko: 멜버른 대학교의 유대계 호주 교수 스티븐 프로워는 사립탐정을 고용했습니다. 자신의 사무실을 점거한 사람들이 캠퍼스 학생인지 확인하기 위해서였습니다. 이는 대학 시위 이후 발생한 일입니다.
items.title_en: Professor Hired Private Investigator After Campus Protest
items.title_ko: 시위 후 교수 사립탐정 고용, 위원회에서 진술
items.title_original: Professor hired private investigator after protest, commission hears

items.raw_excerpt: A 20-year-old pedestrian died after he was struck on Middle Road at Greenbank shortly before 9pm.
items.summary_en: A 20-year-old pedestrian died after being struck on Middle Road in Greenbank. The incident happened shortly before 9pm. Police have seized a vehicle but no arrests have been made.
items.summary_ko: 20세 남성 보행자가 그린뱅크 미들로드에서 차에 치여 숨졌다. 사고는 밤 9시 직전에 발생했으며, 경찰은 차량을 압수했지만 아직 용의자를 체포하지 못했다.
items.title_en: Vehicle seized but no arrests after fatal Greenbank hit-and-run
items.title_ko: 그린뱅크 뺑소니 사고로 20대 보행자 사망, 차량 압수됐지만 체포 없어
items.title_original: Vehicle seized but no arrests after fatal Logan hit-and-run

items.raw_excerpt: Beachside memorial plaques honouring two brothers who died in separate freak accidents will be reinstalled following their family’s battle with a local council south of Perth.
items.summary_en: Memorial plaques honouring two brothers who died in separate accidents near a beach will be reinstalled. The family fought a local council south of Perth to have the plaques returned. The council had reversed its earlier decision to allow the memorials.
items.summary_ko: 별개의 사고로 숨진 두 형제를 기리는 해변 기념 명판이 다시 설치된다. 퍼스 남쪽 지역 지방자치단체에 맞선 가족의 노력 끝에 명판 복원이 결정됐다.
items.title_en: Beach memorial plaques for brothers put back after family campaign
items.title_ko: 가족 노력 끝에 해변 기념 명판 다시 설치
items.title_original: Memorial plaques for brothers to be reinstated as council reverses decision

items.raw_excerpt: Chaos ensued in Mandalahalli village near Bidadi as women farmers in the region went up in arms and wielded brooms at officials who had arrived to conduct the Joint Measurement Committee survey for the proposed Greater Bengaluru Township Project, popularly known as the Bidadi Township Project. Officials had to beat a hasty retreat.
items.summary_en: Women farmers in Mandalahalli village near Bidadi chased government officials with brooms during a land survey for the proposed Greater Bengaluru Township Project. The officials were forced to retreat as the protest escalated. No injuries were reported.
items.summary_ko: 벵갈루루 인근 만달라할리 마을에서 대벵갈루루 타운십 프로젝트를 위한 토지 조사가 진행되던 중, 여성 농민들이 빗자루를 휘둘러 공무원들을 쫓아냈다. 공무원들은 급히 철수해야 했다.
items.title_en: Women farmers chase officials with brooms over land survey in Mandalahalli village
items.title_ko: 비다디 타운십 조사 현장, 여성 농민들이 빗자루로 공무원 추격
items.title_original: Survey for Bidadi Township ends in chaos as women farmers chase officials with brooms

items.raw_excerpt: M.V. Rajesh has assumed charge as the Director of the Institute of Human Resources Development (IHRD), functioning under the Higher Education Department.
items.summary_en: M.V. Rajesh has become the new Director of the Institute of Human Resources Development (IHRD) in Kerala, India. The IHRD operates under the Higher Education Department of the state government.
items.summary_ko: M.V. 라제시가 인도 케랄라주 고등교육부 산하 인력개발연구소(IHRD) 소장에 취임했습니다. IHRD는 케랄라주의 고등교육을 담당하는 주정부 기관입니다.
items.title_en: M.V. Rajesh takes charge as IHRD Director in Kerala
items.title_ko: 케랄라주 IHRD 소장에 M.V. 라제시 취임
items.title_original: M.V. Rajesh assumes charge as IHRD Director

items.raw_excerpt: After asking about re-employment, the man was offered a six-month role at lower pay and given a non-negotiable one-week deadline to decide.
items.summary_en: A man was made to retire without any notice or payment. When he asked about re-employment, he was offered a lower-paying six-month role with only one week to decide. The employment tribunal awarded him S$26,350 in claims against his employer.
items.summary_ko: 한 남성이 아무런 통보도 없이 퇴직을 강요당하고 급여도 받지 못했습니다. 재고용을 문의하자 1주일 내 결정해야 하는 조건으로 더 낮은 급여의 6개월 임시직을 제안받았습니다. 고용심판은 고용주에게 26,350달러의 배상금을 지급하라고 명령했습니다.
items.title_en: Man wins $26,350 after being forced to retire without notice or payment
items.title_ko: 통보 없이 강제 퇴직당한 남성, 고용주에 26,350달러 배상 판결
items.title_original: Man made to retire without notice or payment wins S$26,350 in claims against employer

items.raw_excerpt: Weeks after a bumper harvest flooded the market with cheap durians, sellers say the oversupply has begun to ease as Johor's durian season winds down.
items.summary_en: After weeks of cheap durians from a bumper harvest, prices in Singapore are climbing back up. Sellers say the oversupply from Johor is easing as the season winds down. Prices are expected to keep rising as supplies shrink.
items.summary_ko: 풍년으로 두리안이 넘쳐나며 수_week간 저렴했던 싱가포르의 두리안 가격이 다시 오르고 있다. 조호르바루의 두리안 시즌이 끝나가면서 공급 과잉이 해소되기 시작했다는 것이 판매자들의 설명이다. 공급이 줄어들면서 가격은 계속 상승할 전망이다.
items.title_en: Singapore durian sellers say prices are rising again
items.title_ko: 싱가포르 두리안 판매자들, 가격 다시 상승 중
items.title_original: 'Durians don't wait for you': Sellers in Singapore say prices have started to rise again

items.raw_excerpt: Comme chaque année, la place Bellecour accueillera la cérémonie militaire du 14-Juillet à Lyon ce mardi. Plus de 300 participants défileront devant le public, tandis qu’un village consacré à la défense et à la sécurité sera installé tout au long de la matinée.
items.summary_en: Lyon will host its annual Bastille Day military ceremony at Place Bellecour this Tuesday. Over 300 participants will march in front of the public. A dedicated defense and security village will be set up throughout the morning.
items.summary_ko: 리옹에서는 이번 화요일 벨르쿠르 광장에서 7월 14일 국경일을 기념하는 군사 퍼레이드가 열립니다. 300명 이상의 참가자들이 퍼레이드에 참여하며, 오전 내내 국방과 보안을 주제로 한 마을이 운영됩니다.
items.title_en: Bastille Day Parade and Defense Village Celebrate July 14th in Lyon
items.title_ko: 리옹 벨르쿠르 광장에서 열리는 7월 14일 국경일 군사 퍼레이드 및 국방 마을
items.title_original: Défilé militaire, Rafale et village défense : Lyon célèbre le 14-Juillet place Bellecour - Lyon Mag
